command: /bin/bash -lc "test -f .git/CODEX_COMMIT_MSG && sed -n '1,120p' .git/CODEX_COMMIT_MSG; git add -A && git diff --cached --check && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -F .git/CODEX_COMMIT_MSG"
outputSummary:
fix(orchestrator): reconcile capacity-waiting claims

Summary:
- Refresh and heartbeat valid capacity-waiting claims on every poll.
- Release stale remote claims and local repository reservations safely.
- Cover missing, terminal, unroutable, and ownership-change cases.

Rationale:
- A stale waiter could otherwise reserve its repository until restart.
- Queue reconciliation must preserve valid attempts and retry budgets.

Tests:
- mise exec -- mix test
- mise exec -- mix test --cover (100.00%)
- mise exec -- mix lint
- mise exec -- mix dialyzer
- mise exec -- mix format --check-formatted

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
